sections.paragraph:
fut. יֶעְדֵּה, יֶעְדֵּא Chald. i.q. Hebr.

(1) to pass over, or away, a kingdom, Dan 7:14 to be abrogated, as a law, Dan 6:9, 13 .

(2) to go, to come, followed by בְּ to any thing, Dan 3:27 followed by מִן to go away, to depart, Dan 4:8.

Aphel, causat. of Peal No. 2, to take away, Dan 5:20 7:26 to depose (kings), 2:21 .
